slice1_skeleton_note: Slice 1 placeholder. Final tolerance values will be set in Slice 2 after the upstream calculation chain is wired up.
slice2_status: Slice 2 contract: tolerance drift forbidden without explicit design-amendment (per frozen design §7.4). Numeric abs_tolerance_default / rel_tolerance_default remain TBD-by-Slice-N because the upstream calculation chain is not yet wired up; Slice 2 never silently substitutes a default value. The Slice 2 materialization contract surfaces TBD-by-* tolerance entries as NOT_COMPUTABLE per-field comparisons.

TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V1-SLICE-1.currency_minor_units: integer ONLY (no float for money per frozen design §3.3)
TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V1-SLICE-1.description: Slice 1 placeholder tolerance profile. Final tolerances will be set in Slice 2.
